gt_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.artist FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.flavorText LIKE '%DAS perfekte Gegenmittel zu einer dichten Formation%'
pred_sql: SELECT c.artist FROM cards c JOIN foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid WHERE TRIM(f.text) = 'Das perfekte Gegenmittel zu einer dichten Formation';
question: To which artist does the card with the text "Das perfekte Gegenmittel zu einer dichten Formation" belong?
